text: Thank you all for joining on short notice. We need to address the situation with Capulet Industries.
Romeo, what exactly have you been building? And who authorized the use of company resources?
I used personal time and a private repo. No Montague Tech IP was shared. We built something entirely new.
That is a relief, but the optics are terrible. Capulet legal team is making noise.
I understand. I will reach out to Professor Lawrence. He can mediate. He is respected by both families.
